title: AutoMegaKernel: A Statically-Checked Agent Harness for Self-Retargeting Megakernel Synthesis
authors: Jaber Jaber, Osama Jaber
abstract: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) compiles a HuggingFace Llama-family model into a single persistent cooperative CUDA kernel that runs the whole forward pass in one launch, with no per-model hand-written CUDA. The contribution is the system, not raw speed. A frozen schedule-IR validator statically certifies deadlock-freedom and race-freedom via static graph checks (not a mechanized proof), so an unsafe agent-proposed schedule is rejected before launch: across 7,160 adversarial schedules (6,091 unsafe) it had zero false-accepts and accepted all 360 real lowerings. The same source retargets sm_80/sm_90/sm_120 from one codebase, auto-generates correct megakernels for 10 of 10 supported models, and on a real SmolLM2-135M checkpoint reproduces HuggingFace greedy decode token-for-token (perplexity match 2.5e-7). An unattended, agent-drivable autoresearch loop self-improves the megakernel over its own baseline (1.25-1.72x). A search-found int8 (W8A16) megakernel beats CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16 at batch-1 decode across NVIDIA's datacenter inference fleet: L4 up to 1.33x, the current-gen L40S 1.25-1.27x, A10G up to 1.08x at scale, and the consumer RTX 5090 1.19-1.23x. The ordering is not a clean function of bandwidth (the 864 GB/s L40S beats the 600 GB/s A10G); the divide is inference-class vs training-class. AMK trails cuBLAS on the high-bandwidth training-class A100/H100, where the harness localizes the cross-SM-sync bottleneck; we report the gap plainly. This is a precision-asymmetric (W8A16 vs bf16) comparison at decode position 0; the largest real checkpoint is TinyLlama-1.1B. Code and the harness: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel
title_zh: AutoMegaKernel：一种用于自重定向巨内核合成的静态检查智能体框架
abstract_zh: AutoMegaKernel（AMK）将HuggingFace Llama系列模型编译成一个单一的持久协作式CUDA内核，只需一次启动即可运行整个前向传播，无需为每个模型手写CUDA代码。其贡献在于系统本身，而非原始速度。一个冻结的调度IR验证器通过静态图检查（非机械化证明）静态地确保无死锁和无竞态，因此不安全的代理提议调度在启动前被拒绝：在7,160个对抗性调度（其中6,091个不安全）中，零误接受，并接受了全部360个真实降级。同一源代码可针对sm_80/sm_90/sm_120重新目标，从单一代码库自动为10个受支持模型中的全部10个生成正确的megakernel，并在真实的SmolLM2-135M检查点上重现了HuggingFace贪婪解码的逐token一致性（困惑度匹配2.5e-7）。一个无人值守、代理驱动的自动研究循环在其自身基线之上自我改进megakernel（1.25-1.72倍）。研究发现，int8（W8A16）megakernel在NVIDIA数据中心推理集群上的batch-1解码中超越了CUDA图化的cuBLAS bf16：L4高达1.33倍，当前一代L40S为1.25-1.27倍，A10G大规模下高达1.08倍，消费级RTX 5090为1.19-1.23倍。排序并非带宽的简单函数（864 GB/s的L40S优于600 GB/s的A10G）；分水岭在于推理级与训练级。在高带宽训练级A100/H100上，AMK落后于cuBLAS，此时测试环境定位了跨SM同步瓶颈；我们如实报告了这一差距。这是一项在解码位置0处的精度不对称比较（W8A16 vs bf16）；最大的真实检查点为TinyLlama-1.1B。代码和测试环境：https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel

title: PriFT: Prior-Support Guided Supervised Fine-Tuning
authors: Ke Wang, Shuangqi Li, Mathieu Salzmann, Pascal Frossard
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is an efficient approach for downstream task adaptation and often serves as the initialization stage for reinforcement learning (RL), but it can show weaker generalization than RL. A key limitation is its off-policy objective: SFT fits fixed demonstrations token by token, including targets poorly aligned with the model's pretrained distribution, which can lead to overfitting. A recent line of work addresses this issue by assigning larger training weights to tokens better aligned with the current model's predictive distribution, with the intuition that fitting these tokens are less distortive to the model's pretrained knowledge and representations. However, computing the token weights from the model that is currently fine-tuned entangles token weights with the optimization trajectory, inducing a self-reinforcing dynamics as the distribution rapidly departs from the pretrained model. To address this, we propose PriFT (Prior-support guided Fine-Tuning), which derives token weights from a frozen pretrained reference to obtain a stable reweighting signal unaffected by fine-tuning. This signal estimates prior support: the extent to which each target token is supported by the pretrained distribution. Across multiple existing token-reweighting rules, replacing the reweighting signal from the online model to pretrained model consistently improves performance. We introduce two instantiations: PriFT-prob uses pretrained token probability, while PriFT-mass selects tokens by cumulative probability mass under the pretrained distribution. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning, code generation, and medical question answering show that PriFT achieves state-of-the-art results among SFT baselines and provides a better initialization for subsequent RL training.
title_zh: PriFT：先验支持引导的有监督微调
abstract_zh: 监督微调（SFT）是下游任务适配的一种高效方法，常作为强化学习（RL）的初始化阶段，但其泛化能力通常弱于RL。一个关键限制在于其离线策略目标：SFT逐token拟合固定演示样本，包括那些与模型预训练分布对齐不佳的目标，这可能导致过拟合。近期一系列工作通过为与当前模型预测分布对齐更好的token分配更大训练权重来解决此问题，其直觉是拟合这些token对模型预训练知识和表征的扭曲较小。然而，从当前微调模型计算token权重会使token权重与优化轨迹相互纠缠，导致分布迅速偏离预训练模型时产生自我强化动态。为解决此问题，我们提出PriFT（先验支持引导微调），该方法从冻结的预训练参考模型中导出token权重，以获得不受微调影响的稳定重加权信号。该信号估计了先验支持：每个目标token在预训练分布中得到支持的程度。在多种现有的token重加权规则中，将重加权信号从在线模型替换为预训练模型能持续提升性能。我们引入两种实例化方法：PriFT-prob使用预训练token概率，而PriFT-mass根据预训练分布下的累积概率质量选择token。在数学推理、代码生成和医学问答上的大量实验表明，PriFT在SFT基线中取得了最先进的结果，并为后续RL训练提供了更好的初始化。

title: Claude Code-Driving Scenario Mining for the Argoverse 2 Challenge
authors: Wei Deng, Caoshengzhe Xue, Shuaikun Liu, Zhaohong Liu, Mengshi Qi, Huadong Ma
abstract: We present our submission to the CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Challenge. Our system uses a four-stage pipeline: (1) autonomous code generation via a Claude Code agent powered by GLM~5.1, (2) iterative training set screening with Timestamp Balanced Accuracy threshold 0.8 to curate few-shot examples, (3) semantic code review by a separate Claude Code session, and (4) Qwen3-VL scene-level verification to filter false positives. We report results on the Argoverse 2 test set.
title_zh: 面向Argoverse 2挑战赛的Claude Code驾驶场景挖掘
abstract_zh: 我们提交了参加CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2场景挖掘挑战赛的成果。系统采用四阶段流水线：（1）基于GLM~5.1驱动的Claude Code智能体自主生成代码；（2）利用时间戳平衡准确率阈值0.8迭代筛选训练集，以精选少量样本；（3）由另一Claude Code会话进行语义代码审查；（4）通过Qwen3-VL场景级验证过滤误报。我们报告了在Argoverse 2测试集上的结果。

title: Empirical Study for Structured Output Control in LLMs for Software Engineering
authors: Yewei Song, Prateek Rajput, Tiezhu Sun, Saad Ezzini, Tegawendé F. Bissyandé, Jacques Klein
abstract: LLM-generated outputs in software engineering rarely exist in isolation. They must plug into toolchains, APIs, and data pipelines that impose strict, often organization-specific structural contracts. A semantically correct output that violates the expected format is, from the consuming system's perspective, indistinguishable from a wrong answer, making structural fidelity an operational prerequisite for deploying LLMs in practice. Yet current models routinely produce syntactically invalid or structurally non-compliant outputs. Unlike encoders, autoregressive decoders generate text token-by-token with a local rather than global focus, amplifying structural fragility whenever the target format deviates from familiar training distributions. We present a systematic evaluation of structural reliability across four representative SE tasks, categorizing failures into syntax, structural, and semantic errors. We benchmark ways of mitigation targeting the decoder: grammar-constrained decoding, regex-based validation, and a strict template-driven control (Template Token Match Generation, TTMG) to isolate the sources of these failures. TTMG nearly eliminates syntax errors, yet substantial structural and semantic errors persist, demonstrating that the core bottleneck lies beyond syntax formatting. A detailed case study further illustrates how residual errors cascade in downstream workflows. Our findings show that current structure-enforcing tools are necessary but insufficient, and highlight the need for approaches that jointly ensure structural fidelity and semantic correctness in LLM-driven workflows.
title_zh: 针对软件工程中大型语言模型结构化输出控制的实证研究
abstract_zh: 在软件工程中，大语言模型生成的输出很少孤立存在。它们必须接入工具链、API和数据管道，这些系统施加了严格且通常具有组织特异性的结构规范。一个语义正确但违反预期格式的输出，从消费系统的角度来看，与错误答案并无区别，这使得结构保真度成为在实践中部署大语言模型的操作前提。然而，当前模型经常会生成语法无效或结构不符合规范的输出。与编码器不同，自回归解码器以局部而非全局的方式逐词生成文本，当目标格式偏离其熟悉的训练分布时，结构脆弱性会被放大。我们针对四个具有代表性的软件工程任务，对结构可靠性进行了系统性评估，将失败归类为语法错误、结构错误和语义错误。我们基准测试了针对解码器的多种缓解方法：语法约束解码、基于正则表达式的验证，以及严格的模板驱动控制（模板令牌匹配生成，TTMG），以隔离这些失败的根源。TTMG几乎消除了语法错误，但大量结构和语义错误依然存在，这表明核心瓶颈超越了语法格式化。进一步的详细案例研究展示了残余错误如何在下游工作流程中级联。我们的研究结果表明，当前的结构强制工具是必要但不充分的，并凸显了在基于大语言模型的工作流程中需要同时确保结构保真度和语义正确性的方法。

title: Bespoke-Card: Why Tune When You Can Generate? Synthesizing Workload-Specific Cardinality Estimators
authors: Johannes Wehrstein, Anton Winter, Timo Eckmann, Carsten Binnig
abstract: Cardinality estimators are built to support arbitrary schemas and workloads, forcing them to rely on generic statistics even when the schema and workload is known in advance, leaving optimizers prone to large errors and poor plans. We present Bespoke-Card, an agent-driven system that synthesizes workload-specific cardinality estimators as executable code: a planning agent designs the estimators strategies, a coding agent implements them, and a validator scores the estimates against true cardinalities and PostgreSQL estimates, forming a robust and deterministic harness. Going beyond naive prompting, Bespoke-Card uses structured q-error feedback, regression analysis, concrete outlier subplans, a curriculum isolating join-only, filter-only, and full-subplan errors, and archival selection of the best implementation. Injecting its estimates into the optimizer cuts total PostgreSQL runtime on JOB by 33% and reduces median q-error over all JOB subplans by 41%, while synthesizing a strong estimator in under one hour for less than $10. Bespoke-Card is opening a new avenue for cardinality estimation next to classical generic estimators and learned estimator architectures.
title_zh: Bespoke-Card：何必调优，生成即可？——合成面向工作负载的基数估计器
abstract_zh: 基数估计器被设计为支持任意模式和工作负载，即便模式和负载事先已知，它们也迫不得已依赖通用统计信息，导致优化器容易产生巨大误差和糟糕的执行计划。我们提出Bespoke-Card——一个基于代理的系统，可将特定工作负载的基数估计器合成为可执行代码：规划代理设计估计器策略，编码代理实现这些策略，验证器则根据真实基数与PostgreSQL估计结果对估计值进行评分，从而形成一个鲁棒且确定的校验框架。Bespoke-Card超越了简单的提示工程，采用结构化q误差反馈、回归分析、具体的异常子计划、隔离连接/过滤/完整子计划误差的课程学习，以及最优实现的历史归档选择。将其估计值注入优化器后，可将JOB上PostgreSQL总运行时间减少33%，所有JOB子计划的中位q误差降低41%，同时能在不到一小时内、花费不到10美元合成一个强有力的估计器。Bespoke-Card在经典通用估计器和学习型估计器架构之外，为基数估计开辟了新的途径。

title: From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design
authors: Dun Li, Jiatao Li, Hongzhi Li
abstract: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.
title_zh: 从零到一再到一至多：MetaAI递归自设计的可复现工程证据
abstract_zh: 递归自我设计是指借助人工智能对构建、评估和改进AI系统所依赖的机制进行修改。本文不将MetaAI视为一种成熟的范式，而是作为一个工作术语，用以描述一种由人类播种、AI扩展的开发模式，其中设计空间本身成为了修改的目标。我们提出了一个包含四项标准的操作性证据框架：可检验的目标系统、元层级的修改器、反馈导向的选择以及递归延续。随后，我们依据这些标准对包括达尔文·哥德尔机（DGM）、STOP、哥德尔智能体和ShinkaEvolve在内的公开系统进行了映射分析。其中，DGM提供了当前最直接的已公开证据：其发表的结果显示，经过80次迭代，该系统在SWE-bench验证集上的表现从20%提升至50%，在完整Polyglot测试集上从14.2%提升至30.7%，而消融实验表明，开放式探索和自我改进均对提升有所贡献。最后，我们提供了MetaAI-Mini——一个基于HumanEval的可复现协议与代码库。由于本次构建中未包含完整的模型运行结果，MetaAI-Mini仅作为一项协议报告，而非实验结果。

title: PrivCode++: Latent-Conditioned Differentially Private Code Generation for Comprehensive Guarantees
authors: Zheng Liu, Chen Gong, Terry Yue Zhuo, Zhou Yang, Kecen Li, Wenlong Meng, Xinwen Hou, Yu Liu, Xiaochen Li
abstract: Large language models fine-tuned on instruction-code pairs may memorize and subsequently leak sensitive training data. Existing differentially private (DP) code generation methods primarily protect code snippets while assuming prompts are public, which fails in realistic scenarios where prompts may also contain sensitive information. When prompts cannot be explicitly learned or used during generation, code synthesis suffers from severe utility degradation as well as reduced diversity and fidelity. To address these challenges, we propose PrivCode-Plus, the first work to explore DP code generation where both prompts and code snippets are considered sensitive in LLM fine-tuning. PrivCode-Plus introduces a two-stage DP framework with a Privacy-Free Latent Conditioning module, enabling effective DP fine-tuning and data synthesis without direct access to sensitive prompts or code. Extensive experiments show that PrivCode-Plus achieves substantially higher utility than baselines, remains competitive with the method with relaxing privacy assumptions, and provides stronger privacy guarantees.
title_zh: PrivCode++：潜变量条件化的差分隐私代码生成用于全面保证
abstract_zh: 在基于指令-代码对进行微调的大语言模型中，可能会记忆并随后泄露敏感的训练数据。现有的差分隐私（DP）代码生成方法主要保护代码片段，但假设提示是公开的，这在实际场景中无法成立——提示也可能包含敏感信息。当在生成过程中无法显式学习或使用提示时，代码合成会出现严重的实用性下降，同时多样性和保真度也会降低。为解决这些挑战，我们提出了PrivCode-Plus，这是首个探索在LLM微调中同时将提示和代码片段视为敏感信息进行DP代码生成的工作。PrivCode-Plus引入了一个带有“无隐私潜在条件模块”的两阶段DP框架，无需直接访问敏感提示或代码即可实现有效的DP微调和数据合成。大量实验表明，PrivCode-Plus在实用性上显著优于基线方法，与放宽隐私假设的方法相比仍具有竞争力，并且提供了更强的隐私保障。

title: Context Rot in AI-Assisted Software Development: Repurposing Documentation Consistency for AI Configuration Artifacts
authors: Christoph Treude, Sebastian Baltes
abstract: Developers increasingly provide AI coding assistants with persistent context through configuration files such as CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and .cursorrules. These files describe code elements, architecture, and development conventions, forming the context that guides AI tool behavior across sessions. As software evolves, this context can become stale, a phenomenon we call context rot. While AI configuration artifacts are new, the underlying consistency problem connects to decades of software documentation research. Researchers have built tools to check consistency between documentation and code, spanning README files, code comments, API documentation, architecture descriptions, and installation instructions. We argue that this existing toolbox is an immediate starting point for detecting context rot, and we present a research roadmap mapping documentation consistency approaches to corresponding problems in this new setting. As preliminary evidence, applying an existing README/wiki consistency checker to a statistically representative sample of 356 repositories identifies stale code element references in 23.0% of repositories, showing that traditional documentation consistency tools can already surface context rot.
title_zh: AI辅助软件开发中的上下文腐烂：将文档一致性重新用于AI配置工件
abstract_zh: 开发者越来越多地通过配置文件（如 CLAUDE.md、AGENTS.md 和 .cursorrules）为 AI 编程助手提供持久化上下文。这些文件描述代码元素、架构和开发规范，构成指导 AI 工具跨会话行为的上下文。随着软件演进，这些上下文可能变得陈旧——我们称之为“上下文腐化（context rot）”。尽管 AI 配置制品是新生事物，但其背后的一致性问题与数十年的软件文档研究一脉相承。研究人员已构建工具来检查文档与代码间的一致性，涵盖 README 文件、代码注释、API 文档、架构描述和安装说明等。我们认为，现有工具箱可作为检测上下文腐化的直接起点，并提出了一个研究路线图，将文档一致性方法映射到这一新场景中的对应问题。初步证据显示，将现有的 README/维基一致性检查工具应用于 356 个仓库的统计代表性样本后，发现 23.0% 的仓库存在过时代码元素引用，这表明传统文档一致性工具已能显式暴露上下文腐化问题。

title: ATTAIN: Automated Exploit Failure Analysis through Trace-Driven Diff Analysis
authors: Xinwei Mao, Zirui Chen, Xing Hu, Xin Xia
abstract: Exploits are widely used to check whether library vulnerabilities appear in different versions and to mark affected version ranges. Exploit-based checks sometimes fail because exploits stop running on many versions after API or environment changes. Commit-based methods, such as SZZ-style analysis, sometimes miss the right introduce commits and spread labels incorrectly along long version chains. These problems leave many affected versions unlabeled or wrongly labeled and make manual exploit failure analysis very expensive and impractical at scale. We present ATTAIN, a trace-driven diff analysis framework with three modules to assess vulnerability presence across evolving library versions. The modules are trace construction, diff exploration, and affected-version judgment. The trace construction module executes an exploit across historical library versions and compares their behaviors to capture cross-version execution divergences. Using these divergences, the diff exploration module guides an LLM through a finite-state tool loop to autonomously search over version changes and collect vulnerability-relevant diff hunks. The affected-version judgment module reasons over the collected evidence to determine whether the vulnerability exists in each version and outputs the affected version range. We evaluate ATTAIN on an extensive dataset comprising 224 CVEs and 25,943 library versions across 128 libraries. ATTAIN achieves an F1-score of 93.24%, outperforming the commit-based methods V-SZZ and LLM4SZZ by 116.28% and 33.30%, respectively. ATTAIN uses short tool-guided prompts and a fixed number of iterations, keeping token usage low. It matches or surpasses existing methods on frequent CWE types, including cases where exploit runs fail for non-vulnerability reasons or commit messages do not clearly delimit affected versions.
title_zh: ATTAIN：通过跟踪驱动的差异分析实现自动化漏洞利用失败分析
abstract_zh: 漏洞利用通常用于检查不同版本中是否存在库漏洞，并标记受影响版本范围。但基于漏洞利用的检测有时会因API或环境变化导致漏洞利用在多个版本中失效而失败。基于提交的方法（如SZZ风格分析）有时会错误识别引入提交的版本，并在长版本链上错误传播标签。这些问题导致许多受影响版本未被标记或被错误标记，使得手动分析漏洞利用失败的原因成本高昂且难以大规模实施。我们提出ATTAIN框架，这是一种基于轨迹驱动的差异分析框架，包含三个模块用于评估库版本演变过程中的漏洞存在性：轨迹构建、差异探索和受影响版本判定。轨迹构建模块在历史库版本上执行漏洞利用，比较其行为以捕捉跨版本执行差异。基于这些差异，差异探索模块引导LLM通过有限状态工具循环自主搜索版本变更，收集与漏洞相关的差异块。受影响版本判定模块基于收集的证据推断每个版本中是否存在漏洞，并输出受影响版本范围。我们在包含128个库的224个CVE和25,943个库版本的大规模数据集上评估ATTAIN。ATTAIN的F1分数达到93.24%，比基于提交的方法V-SZZ和LLM4SZZ分别提升116.28%和33.30%。ATTAIN使用简短的工具引导提示和固定迭代次数，保持较低token使用量。在常见CWE类型中，ATTAIN达到或超越现有方法，包括漏洞利用因非漏洞原因运行失败或提交信息未清晰界定受影响版本的场景。

title: LongRTL: Graph-Similarity-Guided LLM-driven Long Context RTL Optimization
authors: Yuyang Ye, Che-Kuan Shen, Xiangfei Hu, Yuchen Liu, Shuo Yin, Xufeng Yao, Bei Yu, Tsung-Yi Ho
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show great promise in RTL code generation and optimization. However, real-world RTL designs are typically long, entangled, and poorly modularized, posing a major challenge due to context-length limitations and lack of structure. To overcome these obstacles, we propose a scalable LLM-based RTL optimization framework guided by graph similarity. Our method introduces three collaborative agents: (1) a Partition Agent that decomposes RTL designs into semantically meaningful AST subtrees, guided by AST graph similarity to reusable design templates; (2) an Optimization Agent that generates RTL submodule code based on partitioned subtrees using multi-modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with both AST and RTL guidance; and (3) a Reconstruction Agent that reassembles optimized submodules based on logic-aware ordering and Graph-RAG prompting, ensuring global functional equivalence. Together, these components enable robust, structure-aware optimization of long-context RTL designs, bridging the gap between toy examples and industrial-scale hardware codebases.
title_zh: LongRTL：基于图相似性引导的大语言模型驱动的长上下文RTL优化
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在RTL代码生成和优化方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，现实中的RTL设计通常冗长、相互纠缠且模块化程度低，这因上下文长度限制和结构缺失而构成重大挑战。为克服这些障碍，我们提出了一种基于图相似性的可扩展LLM驱动的RTL优化框架。该方法引入了三个协作智能体：（1）**分区智能体**，它通过AST图相似性指导，将RTL设计分解为语义上有意义的AST子树，并与可重用设计模板对齐；（2）**优化智能体**，基于分区后的子树，利用多模态检索增强生成（RAG），同时结合AST和RTL指导，生成RTL子模块代码；（3）**重构智能体**，基于逻辑感知排序和图谱RAG提示，重新组装优化后的子模块，确保全局功能等价。这些组件协同工作，能够对长上下文RTL设计进行鲁棒且结构感知的优化，弥合了玩具示例与工业级硬件代码库之间的差距。

title: Order Matters: Unveiling the Hidden Impact of Macro Placement Sequences via Proxy-Guided LLM Evolution
authors: Shibing Mo, Jing Liu, Jianchu Xu, Ruilin Wu
abstract: Macro placement is a fundamental step in modern chip physical design, playing a crucial role in determining the solution quality of high-dimensional combinatorial optimization problems. Despite recent advancements in machine learning for spatial coordinate determination, the temporal dimension of placement sequencing remains largely governed by static heuristics. In this work, we demonstrate that the placement sequence is not merely a preprocessing step but a decisive factor in optimization, where suboptimal early decisions trigger irreversible domino effects that constrain the solution space. To harness this unexplored dimension, we propose \textbf{OrderPlace}, a proxy-guided LLM evolution framework for automatically discovering macro placement order strategies. Instead of relying on manually crafted heuristics such as area- or connectivity-based ordering, OrderPlace explores a broader space of code-level policies, ranging from static scoring metrics to dynamic physics-inspired mechanisms. To mitigate the prohibitive cost of evaluating sequences, we introduce a lightweight proxy evaluation mechanism that efficiently filters candidates using a deterministic greedy probe. Experimental results on the standard ISPD 2005 benchmarks demonstrate that OrderPlace discovers novel ordering strategies. Compared with WireMask-EA and the state-of-the-art method EGPlace, OrderPlace reduces wirelength by 34.04\% and 14.08\%, respectively.
title_zh: 顺序至关重要：通过代理引导的大语言模型演化揭示宏放置序列的隐藏影响
abstract_zh: 宏布局是现代芯片物理设计中的基本步骤，在高维组合优化问题的求解质量中起着关键作用。尽管近年来机器学习在空间坐标确定方面取得了进展，但布局序列的时间维度在很大程度上仍由静态启发式方法主导。本研究证明，布局序列不仅是预处理步骤，更是优化中的决定性因素——次优的早期决策会引发不可逆转的连锁效应，从而限制解空间。为利用这一尚未被充分探索的维度，我们提出**OrderPlace**，一种代理引导的大型语言模型进化框架，用于自动发现宏布局顺序策略。OrderPlace不依赖于手动设计的启发式规则（如基于面积或连通性的排序），而是探索更广泛的代码级策略空间，涵盖从静态评分指标到动态物理启发机制。为缓解评估序列的过高成本，我们引入轻量级代理评估机制，通过确定性贪婪探针高效筛选候选序列。在标准ISPD 2005基准测试上的实验结果表明，OrderPlace发现了新颖的排序策略。与WireMask-EA及当前最先进方法EGPlace相比，OrderPlace分别将线长减少了34.04%和14.08%。

title: FASE: Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy for Code Quality
authors: Shizhe Lin, Ladan Tahvildari
abstract: Multi-agent code generation offers a promising paradigm for autonomous software development by simulating the human software engineering lifecycle. However, system reliability remains hindered by LLM hallucinations and error propagation across interacting agents. While semantic entropy provides a principled way to quantify uncertainty without ground-truth answers, current methods often rely on costly LLM-driven equivalence checks. In this work, we introduce Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy (FASE), a novel metric that approximates functional correctness based on the minimum spanning tree of structural and semantic dissimilarity graphs. Evaluations on HumanEval and BigCodeBench demonstrate that FASE outperforms state-of-the-art semantic entropy by LLM entailment, achieving a 25% average improvement in Spearman correlation and a 19% increase in ROCAUC score against Pass@1 from ground-truth test cases when using the Qwen3-Embedding-8B model. Furthermore, by eliminating costly LLM-driven equivalence evaluation, FASE incurs negligible computational overhead, requiring only approximately 0.3% of the runtime cost of traditional semantic entropy approaches. These results position FASE as a practical, cost-effective solution for optimizing uncertainty quantification in real-world multi-agent workflows.
title_zh: FASE：用于代码质量的快速自适应语义熵
abstract_zh: 多智能体代码生成通过模拟人类软件工程生命周期，为自主软件开发提供了一种有前景的范式。然而，大语言模型的幻觉和跨交互智能体的错误传播仍会阻碍系统可靠性。虽然语义熵提供了一种无需真实答案即可量化不确定性的规范方法，但当前方法通常依赖成本高昂的LLM驱动等价性检查。在本工作中，我们提出了快速自适应语义熵（Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy, FASE），这是一种基于结构和语义不相似图的最小生成树来近似功能正确性的新型度量指标。在HumanEval和BigCodeBench上的评估表明，FASE优于基于LLM蕴含的最先进语义熵方法：在使用Qwen3-Embedding-8B模型时，相对于真实测试用例的Pass@1指标，FASE的Spearman相关性平均提升25%，ROCAUC得分提升19%。此外，通过消除成本高昂的LLM驱动等价性评估，FASE仅产生可忽略的计算开销，其运行时间成本仅为传统语义熵方法的约0.3%。这些结果使FASE成为优化现实多智能体工作流中不确定性量化的实用且经济高效的解决方案。

title: HDSL: A Hierarchical Domain-Specific Language for Structured 3D Indoor Scene Generation and Localized Editing with LLM Agents
authors: Letian Li, Chao Shen, Shuzhao Xie, Chenghao Gu, ZhengXiao He, Yu Meng, Xin Yang, Wenyuan Jiang, Zhi Wang
abstract: Text-driven indoor scene generation and editing require an intermediate representation that language models can both produce and revise. Existing LLM-based systems often rely on scene graphs or global constraint lists, which are compact but underspecify local geometry and make instruction-based edits difficult to localize. We frame this problem as structured program generation and local program repair, and propose Hierarchical Descriptive Scene Language (HDSL), an XML/CSS-style domain-specific language for structured 3D indoor scenes. HDSL represents rooms, regions, objects, and support surfaces as a tree with local coordinates, making complex scenes easier to plan recursively and easier to retrieve for editing. Our pipeline uses LLM agents to generate HDSL subtrees with bounded verification, grounds non-virtual nodes through multimodal asset retrieval, and applies force-directed layout optimization to repair boundary and collision errors. For editing, Hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Generation retrieves the relevant subtree, asks the LLM to rewrite only that local context, and merges the result back through a deterministic three-way merge. In our reproduced benchmark, HDSL improves average object coverage, text-scene alignment, and generation time over full text-to-scene baselines while remaining competitive with recent layout-only reproductions on geometry metrics; for editing, HRAG reduces token use by $5.22\times$ and runtime by $6.19\times$, produces valid DSL for all eight paired edits, and better preserves unrelated scene objects.
title_zh: HDSL: 一种用于结构化3D室内场景生成与基于LLM智能体的局部编辑的层次化领域特定语言
abstract_zh: 文本驱动的室内场景生成与编辑需要一种语言模型既能生成又能修改的中间表示形式。现有的基于大语言模型（LLM）的系统通常依赖场景图或全局约束列表，这些表示虽然紧凑，但无法充分定义局部几何结构，且难以定位基于指令的编辑操作。我们将此问题定义为结构化程序生成与局部程序修复，并提出分层描述性场景语言（HDSL），这是一种面向结构化3D室内场景的XML/CSS风格领域特定语言。HDSL将房间、区域、物体及支撑面表示为一棵带有局部坐标的树，使得复杂场景更易于递归规划，也便于检索和编辑。我们的流程利用LLM智能体生成带有边界验证的HDSL子树，通过多模态资产检索实现非虚拟节点的实例化，并应用力导向布局优化来修复边界与碰撞错误。在编辑方面，分层检索增强生成（HRAG）检索相关子树，要求LLM仅重写该局部上下文，并通过确定性三路合并将结果整合回原结构。在我们复现的基准测试中，HDSL在物体覆盖度、文本-场景对齐度及生成时间上均优于全文本到场景的基线方法，同时在几何指标上与近期仅布局复现的方法保持竞争力；在编辑方面，HRAG将令牌使用量降低至原来的5.22倍，运行时间缩短至原来的6.19倍，为全部八组配对编辑生成了有效的DSL，并更好地保留了无关场景物体。

title: Modeling Components and Connections in Cyber-Physical Systems
authors: Kate Sanborn, Tanuj Kenchannavar, Vakul Nath, Jonathan Sprinkle
abstract: Text based configuration files for cyber-physical systems show the hierarchy of component modules well but often hide the details of connections and interfaces between modules. A model-based visual approach to these configuration files can better capture this information. The XML structure of Robot Operating System (ROS) launch files can be improved using a modeling approach. This paper presents ROSLaunchVisual, a model-integrated environment built on WebGME for designing, visualizing, and managing ROS launch files. The tool raises the level of abstraction by allowing developers to create and modify launch files using a graphical interface that represents nodes, publishers, subscribers, and arguments as interconnected components. The tool provides a dynamic system analysis that can then be used in the static development and analysis of new and existing launch files. ROSLaunchVisual incorporates features such as metamodel-driven validation, automatic import/export of launch files, and visual communication mapping. Plugins further enhance functionality by updating libraries, checking for semantic errors, and managing remaps. By making launch file creation more intuitive and less error-prone, ROSLaunchVisual improves development efficiency and system understanding, especially in collaborative or large-scale robotics projects.
title_zh: 信息物理系统中的组件与连接建模
abstract_zh: 基于文本的信息物理系统配置文件虽然能够很好地展示组件模块的层次结构，但往往隐藏了模块之间连接和接口的细节。采用基于模型的视觉化方法处理这些配置文件，可以更好地捕获这些信息。机器人操作系统（ROS）启动文件的XML结构可以通过建模方法进行改进。本文介绍了ROSLaunchVisual——一个基于WebGME构建的模型集成环境，用于设计、可视化和管理ROS启动文件。该工具通过提供图形化界面，将节点、发布者、订阅者和参数表示为相互连接的组件，从而提升了抽象层次，使开发者能够创建和修改启动文件。该工具还提供了动态系统分析功能，可用于新启动文件和现有启动文件的静态开发与分析。ROSLaunchVisual集成了元模型驱动的验证、启动文件的自动导入/导出以及可视化通信映射等特性。插件通过更新库、检查语义错误和管理重映射进一步增强了功能。通过使启动文件创建更加直观且不易出错，ROSLaunchVisual提高了开发效率和对系统的理解，尤其在协作性或大规模机器人项目中表现突出。

title: Code Is More Than Text: Uncertainty Estimation for Code Generation
authors: Yuling Shi, Caiqi Zhang, Yuexian Li, Haopeng Wang, Yeheng Chen, Nigel Collier, Xiaodong Gu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as code generators, where silently wrong programs pose real safety and reliability risks. Reliable uncertainty estimation (UE) is essential for selective prediction, human-in-the-loop review, and downstream agentic decisions. Yet most existing code UE methods are inherited from natural language (NL) generation and ignore properties that make code distinct. We argue that code differs from NL in three ways: a single wrong token can break an entire program (token fragility); algorithmic intent and concrete implementation can disagree independently (intent-code gap); and programs can be executed (executability). We instantiate these properties as three orthogonal uncertainty axes: lexical (Top-K token entropy), algorithmic (pseudo-code consistency), and functional (behavioral consistency). Across five code LLMs, our three-axis ensemble improves average AUROC from 0.696 for the strongest NL-derived baseline to 0.776 (+8.1 points). Notably, on Qwen3-14B, our single-pass Top-K token entropy matches the strongest multi-pass baseline while being over 3x cheaper; across models, it remains a competitive low-cost signal. These results suggest that code UE deserves code-specific design rather than direct NL ports.
title_zh: 代码不止于文本：代码生成中的不确定性估计
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被部署为代码生成器，其中静默错误的程序会带来真正的安全性和可靠性风险。可靠的不确定性估计（UE）对于选择性预测、人在回路审查以及下游自主决策至关重要。然而，大多数现有的代码不确定性估计方法都继承自自然语言（NL）生成，忽略了使代码与众不同的特性。我们认为代码在三个方面与自然语言不同：单个错误词元可能导致整个程序崩溃（词元脆弱性）；算法意图与具体实现可能相互不一致（意图-代码差距）；以及程序可以被执行（可执行性）。我们将这些属性实例化为三个正交的不确定性轴：词汇（Top-K词元熵）、算法（伪代码一致性）和功能（行为一致性）。在五个代码大型语言模型上，我们的三轴集成将平均AUROC从最强自然语言衍生基线的0.696提高到0.776（+8.1个百分点）。值得注意的是，在Qwen3-14B上，我们的单次通过Top-K词元熵与最强的多次通过基线相当，同时成本低3倍以上；在各种模型上，它仍然是一个具有竞争力的低成本信号。这些结果表明，代码不确定性估计值得专门的代码特定设计，而非直接移植自然语言方法。

title: Demonstrating chart-plot: Closing the Last Mile of Academic Chart Generation
authors: Yinghao Tang, Yupeng Xie, Yingchaojie Feng, Jiale Lao, Tingfeng Lan, Wei Chen
abstract: Large language models can translate a researcher's intent into runnable matplotlib code, yet the resulting chart rarely lands in a paper without multiple rounds of manual revision. We argue that the open problem is not chart code generation but chart publication: making the output look like a top-venue figure, survive the target layout, and respond to precise author edits. We present chart-plot, an agentic harness that closes this last mile through three components: (1) a style-aware code generator conditioned on a textual style skill distilled from accepted figures at the target venue, (2) a deployment-aware render loop that compiles the chart inside the target LaTeX context and revises until layout constraints are met, and (3) a structured edit layer that exposes every chart element as a directly manipulable handle. We report early results on three chart-type case studies (grouped bar, scaling line, paired distributions) and a small user study.
title_zh: 演示图表绘制：打通学术图表生成的最后一公里
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型可以将研究者的意图转化为可运行的Matplotlib代码，但生成的图表通常需要经过多轮手动修改才能最终用于论文。我们认为，当前的核心问题并非图表代码生成，而是图表的发表化：让输出结果看起来像顶级会议的图表，适配目标排版布局，并响应作者精确的修改需求。为此，我们提出chart-plot——一个缩进最后完成阶段的智能代理框架，包含三个组件：(1) 基于文本风格技能的代码生成器，该风格从目标会议已接收图表中提取；(2) 部署感知的渲染循环，在目标LaTeX上下文中编译图表，并不断修改直至满足布局约束；(3) 结构化编辑层，将每个图表元素暴露为可直接操作的控制柄。我们报告了三种图表类型的案例研究（分组柱状图、缩放折线图、配对分布图）的初步结果以及一项小规模用户研究。

title: OpenOpt: An Open-Source SRAM Optimizer Based on Equivalent Circuit Model
authors: Yikai Wang, Yiheng Wu, Can Wang, Bohao Liu, Junhao Ma, Zhuohua Liu, Qinxin Mei, Shan Shen
abstract: This paper proposes a co-optimization framework that jointly optimizes SRAM architecture and transistor sizing using equivalent circuit models. The framework simplifies inactive SRAM cells into equivalent RC loads and static power models, achieving up to 61.4$\times$ simulation speedup while maintaining high fidelity (read/write delay error $<$0.22%, power error $<$1.68%). A joint search space encompassing architecture parameters and device sizing integrates seven algorithms including SA, PSO, Bayesian Optimization variants, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithms. Based on FreePDK45, ablation experiments confirm complementary gains from architecture selection and transistor sizing. Among all algorithms, MOEA/D achieves the best Figure of Merit (8.2721), yielding 6.2% improvement in SNM, 73.6% reduction in area, and 42.3% reduction in peak power. The framework is publicly available at https://github.com/W1Y1K1/OpenOpt.
title_zh: OpenOpt：基于等效电路模型的开源SRAM优化器
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种协同优化框架，通过等效电路模型联合优化SRAM架构与晶体管尺寸。该框架将非活跃SRAM单元简化为等效RC负载和静态功耗模型，在保持高保真度（读写延迟误差<0.22%，功耗误差<1.68%）的同时，实现了最高61.4倍的仿真加速。联合搜索空间涵盖架构参数与器件尺寸，集成了七种算法，包括模拟退火（SA）、粒子群优化（PSO）、贝叶斯优化变体以及多目标进化算法。基于FreePDK45的消融实验证实，架构选择与晶体管尺寸优化可产生互补性增益。在所有算法中，MOEA/D取得了最佳品质因数（8.2721），实现了静态噪声容限（SNM）提升6.2%、面积缩减73.6%、峰值功耗降低42.3%。该框架已开源，代码地址为：https://github.com/W1Y1K1/OpenOpt。

title: REFLECT: Intervention-Supported Error Attribution for Silent Failures in LLM Agent Traces
authors: Xiaofeng Lin, Yingxu Wang, Tung Sum Thomas Kwok, Daniel Guo, Sahil Arun Nale, Charles Fleming, Guang Cheng
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents now solve complex tasks through long plan-and-execution traces, yet the ability to locate errors in a completed traces still lags far behind, especially in the \emph{silent failure} regime. Existing approaches predict suspect steps via classifiers or LLM judges, or recover correct answers via retry, but none feed the intervention outcome back to \emph{refine the attribution itself}. We propose \methodname, a method that closes this gap by diagnosing a candidate error step, testing it through controlled replay with a diagnosis-specific patch, and using the verified outcome flip as contrastive evidence to refine the final attribution. Across four localization benchmarks spanning multi-hop reasoning across domains, \methodname achieves the highest localization accuracy among same-auditor methods across all four benchmarks, with the largest gains on structured tool-use traces, while providing actionable localization even when ground-truth answers are unavailable.
title_zh: REFLECT：干预支持的LLM代理轨迹静默失败错误归因
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理现在通过长时间的计划与执行轨迹来解决复杂任务，但在完成的轨迹中定位错误的能力仍远远落后，尤其是在\emph{静默失败}机制下。现有方法通过分类器或LLM裁判预测可疑步骤，或通过重试恢复正确答案，但没有任何方法将干预结果反馈回来以\emph{优化归因本身}。我们提出\methodname，该方法通过诊断候选错误步骤、使用诊断特定的补丁进行受控重放测试，并利用验证后的结果翻转作为对比证据来优化最终归因，从而弥补了这一差距。在跨越领域多跳推理的四个定位基准测试中，\methodname在所有四个基准测试中均达到了同审核方法中的最高定位准确率，在结构化工具使用轨迹上取得了最大增益，并且即使在没有真实答案的情况下也能提供可行的定位。

title: RTL-BenchLS: A Large-Scale Benchmark for RTL Reasoning and Generation with Large Language Models
authors: Jing Wang, Shang Liu, Wenji Fang, Yuchao Wu, Yugao Zhu, Zhiyao Xie
abstract: LLM-based RTL generation and reasoning is a promising direction for hardware design automation. High-quality benchmarks are critical infrastructure for tracking progress in this direction. However, existing RTL benchmarks face inherent limitations in both scale and task scope. The designs they cover are typically small and simple, and the tasks focus almost entirely on specification-to-RTL generation. Frontier models' performance already saturates on the existing benchmarks. Scaling these benchmarks up is fundamentally difficult because aligned labels are required for benchmarking, such as specifications and testbenches. Such aligned high-quality data are rarely available for real-world designs. We introduce RTL-BenchLS, a large-scale benchmark addressing both limitations above. It contains over 10,000 formally verified Verilog designs, covering substantially larger and more complex designs than existing benchmarks. Beyond specification-to-RTL generation, we propose three novel tasks that jointly evaluate reasoning and generation: round-trip reasoning, masked-content reasoning, and repository-issue reasoning. The first two are self-supervised, which directly resolves the scaling bottleneck. All tasks are verified through formal equivalence checking without any manual testbenches. We evaluate eight LLMs on RTL-BenchLS. Even the best model reaches only 23% on natural-language round-trip reasoning, 28% on masked-content reasoning, and 12% on repository-issue fixing. RTL-BenchLS is substantially more challenging than existing benchmarks. It leaves ample room for future improvement and offers guidance for developing LLM-based methods for hardware design.
title_zh: RTL-BenchLS: 一个用于基于大语言模型的RTL推理与生成的大规模基准
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的寄存器传输级（RTL）生成与推理是硬件设计自动化领域一个极具前景的方向。高质量的基准测试是追踪该方向进展的关键基础设施。然而，现有RTL基准测试在规模和任务范围上均存在固有局限性：其覆盖的设计通常规模小且结构简单，任务几乎完全集中于从规范到RTL的生成。前沿模型在现有基准测试上的性能已趋近饱和。由于基准测试需要对齐的标注数据（如规范和测试平台），扩展这些基准测试的规模面临根本性困难——现实世界设计中极少存在此类高质量对齐数据。为此，我们提出RTL-BenchLS，一个旨在同时解决上述两大局限的大规模基准测试。它包含超过10,000个经形式化验证的Verilog设计，覆盖的设计规模和复杂度远超现有基准测试。除规范到RTL的生成外，我们提出三项联合评估推理与生成能力的新任务：往返推理、掩码内容推理和仓库问题推理。前两项任务采用自监督方式，直接解决了规模扩展的瓶颈。所有任务均通过形式等价性检查进行验证，无需任何手动测试平台。我们使用RTL-BenchLS评估了八种LLM。即使性能最佳的模型，在自然语言往返推理任务上仅达到23%，掩码内容推理任务上为28%，仓库问题修复任务上为12%。RTL-BenchLS的挑战性显著高于现有基准测试，为未来改进留下了充足空间，并为开发基于LLM的硬件设计方法提供了指导。

title: SIGA: Self-Evolving Coding-Agent Adapters for Scientific Simulation
authors: Matthew Ho, Brian Liu, Jixuan Chen, Audrey Wang, Lianhui Qin
abstract: Advanced scientific simulators expose specialized input languages that turn simulation goals into executable configurations, but learning them can cost domain scientists hours to days. We study simulator setup as a problem of agent-tool interface grounding: what minimal simulator-specific adaptations are needed for an off-the-shelf coding agent to operate real scientific software? Our intuition is that coding agents already know how to navigate files, edit code, run commands, and repair outputs, but they lack the simulator's executable contract: its vocabulary, structural constraints, validation rules, and termination conditions. We introduce SIGA, a Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter that supplies this contract through retrieval, procedural memory, in-trajectory validation, and validation-enforced termination. We primarily evaluate SIGA on GEOS, an open-source multiphysics simulator used in subsurface science. SIGA produces a complete GEOS deck in about five minutes with TreeSim above 0.90, matching an extended-budget human expert who took about three hours, a roughly 36x wall-clock speedup. On a harder held-out set, grounding raises TreeSim from 0.720 to 0.789, a roughly 10% relative gain over the bare agent, and can reduce the across-seed standard deviation by 16x. Self-evolution further improves SIGA by rewriting adapter contents from prior trajectories, yielding the highest held-out GEOS mean and matching or outperforming the strongest hand-designed configuration. Transfers to OpenFOAM and LAMMPS show that the dominant mechanism shifts by interface: validation matters most when structural completeness is the bottleneck, while memory and retrieval matter most when domain correctness is the bottleneck. These results suggest that lightweight, self-improvable grounding layers can turn general coding agents into practical operators of scientific software.
title_zh: SIGA：面向科学模拟的自我进化编程智能体适配器
abstract_zh: 先进科学模拟器配备了专门的输入语言，能将模拟目标转化为可执行配置，但学习这些语言可能需要领域科学家花费数小时到数天的时间。我们将模拟器配置问题研究为智能体-工具接口接地（agent-tool interface grounding）的问题：对于现成的编码智能体来说，需要哪些最小的模拟器特定适配才能操作真实的科学软件？我们的直觉是，编码智能体已经知道如何浏览文件、编辑代码、运行命令和修复输出，但它们缺少模拟器的可执行契约：即其词汇表、结构约束、验证规则和终止条件。我们引入了SIGA（Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter），一种模拟器接口接地适配器，通过检索、程序记忆、轨迹内验证和基于验证的终止来提供这一契约。我们主要在GEOS（一款用于地下科学领域的开源多物理场模拟器）上评估SIGA。SIGA能在约五分钟内生成完整的GEOS输入文件，TreeSim分数超过0.90，与花费约三小时的扩展预算人类专家相当，实际时间加速约36倍。在更难的保留测试集上，接地机制将TreeSim从0.720提升至0.789，相对裸智能体提升约10%，并将跨种子标准差降低16倍。自我进化通过基于先前轨迹重写适配器内容进一步改进了SIGA，在保留的GEOS测试集上取得了最高均值，并匹配或超越了最强的手动设计配置。在OpenFOAM和LAMMPS上的迁移实验表明，主导机制因接口而异：当结构完整性成为瓶颈时，验证最为重要；而当领域正确性成为瓶颈时，记忆和检索最为重要。这些结果表明，轻量级、可自我改进的接地层能将通用编码智能体转变为科学软件的实用操作者。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Prompting Strategies for LLM-Based Combinatorial Optimization
authors: Taha Chadli, Asmaa Mourhir
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Innovative Research in Applied Science, Engineering and Technology (IRASET)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable performance on natural language understanding tasks but struggle with mathematical optimization problems, primarily due to calculation hallucinations and constraint tracking failures. The LLM-based Formalized Programming (LLMFP) framework addresses the above problems by shifting the role of the LLM from a solver to a translator that converts the natural language problems into executable Python code utilizing the Z3 solver. While the framework achieves up to 95% accuracy, its monolithic design introduces limitations such as error propagation, the lack of validation between stages, and parsing difficulties. Error analysis shows that the majority of LLMFP failures are due to formatting and parsing issues rather than reasoning errors. This paper presents the Parser-CoderValidator (PCV) technique, a three-stage modular architecture. The technique decomposes the optimization problem into three stages. First, we establish a new baseline through a comprehensive comparative analysis of the performance of the four state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-OSS-20B, GPT-OSS-120B, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Grok-Code-Fast-1) on 687 optimization problems across three problem domains: Coffee Supply Chain, Facility Location, and Workforce Scheduling. We then present a comparison of several prompting strategies, demonstrating that PCV achieves up to 39.71% overall accuracy improvements over the LLMFP baseline, with the most dramatic gains in Facility Location. The results underscore the significance of the PCV framework, which demonstrates that careful design of the prompting and validation process is as critical as model selection for achieving reliable LLM-based optimization.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的组合优化提示策略比较评估
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）在自然语言理解任务上表现出色，但在数学优化问题中常因计算幻觉和约束追踪失败而表现不佳。基于LLM的形式化编程（LLMFP）框架通过将LLM的角色从求解者转变为翻译者，将自然语言问题转化为可执行的Python代码（利用Z3求解器），从而解决了上述问题。尽管该框架的准确率高达95%，但其整体式设计存在误差传播、阶段间缺乏验证以及解析困难等局限。误差分析显示，LLMFP的多数失败源于格式化和解析问题，而非推理错误。本文提出解析器-编码器-验证器（PCV）技术，这是一种三阶段模块化架构。该技术将优化问题分解为三个阶段。首先，我们通过全面比较四个最先进的大语言模型（GPT-OSS-20B、GPT-OSS-120B、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Grok-Code-Fast-1）在涵盖咖啡供应链、设施选址与员工排班三个问题领域的687个优化问题上的表现，建立了新的基准。随后，我们比较了多种提示策略，结果表明PCV相较于LLMFP基准实现了高达39.71%的整体准确率提升，其中设施选址问题领域改进最为显著。这些结果凸显了PCV框架的重要性，表明精心设计提示和验证过程与模型选择同等关键，是实现可靠基于LLM的优化的核心要素。

title: Physics-Informed Neural and Graph Learning Framework for Operational Amplifier Performance Prediction and Sizing
authors: Rejith Kumar G, Yukti Kumar, Achyutha S, Sunita M S
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: This paper presents a neural network approach to designing and optimizing operational amplifiers. The novelty of the work lies in the approach that combines a PhysicsInformed Neural Network (PINN), which enforces steady-state differential-algebraic circuit equations, with a topology-aware Physics-Informed Graph Neural Network (PI-GNN) derived from physics-embedded circuit graphs. This dual-path architecture enables accurate forward performance prediction as well as inverse design, directly mapping target specifications to optimal transistor dimensions. The framework is trained and validated using high-fidelity Cadence Virtuoso simulations. Experimental results demonstrate prediction errors below 5% for key metrics, which include DC gain, unity-gain bandwidth, phase margin, slew rate, and CMRR. The inverse sizing achieves specification matching within 5% without iterative SPICE optimization, highlighting the effectiveness of physics-guided neural and graph learning for scalable analog IC design automation.
title_zh: 面向运算放大器性能预测与尺寸设计的物理信息神经与图学习框架
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的方法来设计与优化运算放大器。该工作的创新之处在于结合了两种网络架构：一是物理信息神经网络（PINN），用于强制执行稳态微分代数电路方程；二是从物理嵌入电路图中推导出的拓扑感知物理信息图神经网络（PI-GNN）。这种双路径架构既能实现正向性能的精确预测，也能实现逆向设计，直接根据目标规格映射出最优晶体管尺寸。该框架使用高保真度的Cadence Virtuoso仿真数据进行训练和验证。实验结果表明，对于关键指标（包括直流增益、单位增益带宽、相位裕度、压摆率和共模抑制比）的预测误差低于5%。在无需迭代SPICE优化的情况下，逆向尺寸调整实现了规格匹配度在5%以内，凸显了物理引导的神经网络与图学习在可扩展模拟集成电路设计自动化中的有效性。

title: A Compact Population-Activity Detector for Event-Driven Gating in Neuromorphic Pipelines
authors: Gourab Datta, Sumaia Jahan Mishu, Sarah Safura Sharif, Yaser Mike Banad
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Event-driven systems benefit from suppressing unnecessary downstream computation when input activity is low. This paper presents a compact population-activity detector for event-driven gating, implemented as a purely combinational digital primitive (popcount + programmable threshold compare) in Cadence using a 90 nm process library. The circuit accepts five binary activity inputs and asserts an enable signal when the instantaneous population count exceeds a configurable threshold. We formulate gating as a trade-off between compute suppression and activation fidelity, and we provide an evaluation protocol based on duty-cycle, false activation/suppression rates, and activation-latency statistics under controlled activity/noise conditions. The proposed detector serves as a reusable low-overhead building block for gating expensive stages in neuromorphic and event-based processing pipelines.
title_zh: 一种用于神经形态流水线中事件驱动门控的紧凑型群体活动检测器
abstract_zh: 事件驱动系统受益于在输入活动较低时抑制不必要的下游计算。本文提出了一种用于事件驱动门控的紧凑型群体活动检测器，该检测器采用纯组合数字原语（popcount + 可编程阈值比较）实现，并使用Cadence的90纳米工艺库完成设计。该电路接收五个二进制活动输入，当瞬时群体计数超过可配置阈值时，触发使能信号。我们将门控问题表述为计算抑制与激活保真度之间的权衡，并提供了一种基于占空比、误激活/误抑制率以及受控活动/噪声条件下的激活延迟统计数据的评估协议。所提出的检测器可作为低开销的可重用构建模块，用于门控神经形态和基于事件处理流水线中的昂贵阶段。

title: MSA-CongNet: Multi-Scale Attention with Noise-Aware Regularization for VLSI Congestion Prediction
authors: Ziyan Qu, Yuxiang Liu, Wenjun Zhu, Zhengkang Zhu
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Information Science, Electrical and Automation Engineering (ISEAE)
abstract: Accurate congestion prediction at the placement stage is critical for reducing design iterations and accelerating timing closure in modern electronic design automation (EDA) flows. Although learning-based methods have shown promise on EDA benchmarks such as CircuitNet, existing approaches suffer from three persistent limitations: (1) single-scale feature extraction fails to capture the spatial heterogeneity of congestion patterns ranging from local pin clusters to global routing demand; (2) convolutional architectures lack explicit modeling of long-range dependencies between distant hotspots sharing routing resources; and (3) models trained on early-stage placement features are brittle under the inherent noise of pre-routing estimations. To address these challenges, we propose MSA-CongNet, a unified framework comprising three synergistic modules: (1) a Multi-Scale Feature Pyramid (MSFP) that encodes hierarchical spatial context through top-down fusion across four resolution levels; (2) a Spatial Cross-Attention (SCA) mechanism with learnable geometric bias that captures non-local hotspot correlations; and (3) a Noise-Aware Regularization (NAR) strategy that enforces prediction consistency under controlled input perturbation. Experiments on CircuitNet demonstrate that MSA-CongNet reduces MAE by 36.8% over the strongest baseline while achieving 24% faster inference.
title_zh: MSA-CongNet: 多尺度注意力与噪声感知正则化用于VLSI拥塞预测
abstract_zh: 在当代电子设计自动化（EDA）流程中，布局阶段的精准拥塞预测对于减少设计迭代、加速时序收敛至关重要。尽管基于学习的方法在CircuitNet等EDA基准上展现出潜力，但现有方法仍存在三个持续性的局限：（1）单尺度特征提取无法捕捉从局部引脚簇到全局布线需求的拥塞模式空间异质性；（2）卷积架构缺乏对共享布线资源的远距离热点之间长程依赖关系的显式建模；（3）基于早期布局特征训练的模型在前布线阶段固有噪声下鲁棒性不足。为应对这些挑战，我们提出MSA-CongNet——一个包含三个协同模块的统一框架：（1）多尺度特征金字塔（MSFP），通过四个分辨率层级上的自上而下融合编码层次化空间上下文；（2）空间交叉注意力（SCA）机制，结合可学习的几何偏置以捕获非局部热点关联；（3）噪声感知正则化（NAR）策略，在受控输入扰动下强制保持预测一致性。在CircuitNet上的实验表明，MSA-CongNet相较于最强基线将平均绝对误差（MAE）降低了36.8%，同时推理速度提升了24%。

title: A Cascading Deep Learning Framework for Large-Scale Microwave Circuit Design
authors: Changchun Li, Weidong Chen, Chang Chen, Xiang Zhang, Sensong An
publish: 2026 IEEE 19th Dallas Circuits and Systems Conference (DCAS)
abstract: Electromagnetic (EM) simulation of large-scale, non-periodic microwave structures poses prohibitive computational challenges. Meanwhile, conventional domain decomposition methods (DDM) often struggle to resolve complex inter-subdomain connectivity. To address these limitations, we propose a novel AI-based computational framework leveraging the Multi-port Analysis Pixel EM Simulator (MAPES). This approach enables arbitrary partition connectivity and achieves rapid performance prediction with minimal training data requirements. Furthermore, to mitigate accuracy degradation arising from physical approximations, a neural network-based residual correction module is integrated to systematically refine the predictive responses. This hybrid physics-informed approach reduces computational complexity by orders of magnitude while maintaining high fidelity, providing a scalable and efficient solution for advanced EM design.
title_zh: 一种用于大规模微波电路设计的级联深度学习框架
abstract_zh: 面向大规模、非周期性微波结构的电磁（EM）仿真面临着严峻的计算挑战。同时，传统的域分解方法（DDM）在解决复杂的子域间连通性时往往存在困难。为克服这些局限，我们提出了一种基于人工智能的新型计算框架，该框架利用了多端口分析像素EM仿真器（MAPES）。该方法实现了任意分区间的连通性，并能在极少的训练数据需求下实现快速性能预测。此外，为缓解物理近似导致的精度下降，我们集成了一个基于神经网络的残差校正模块，系统地优化预测响应。这种混合物理信息方法将计算复杂度降低了数个数量级，同时保持了高保真度，为先进EM设计提供了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案。
